titlestmt.titleproper: Finding Aid for the Sandy Gooch papers LSC.2471
titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by Sage Scanlon-Perez in the Center for Primary Research Training (CFPRT), under the supervision of Emily Wittenberg, 2026.

p.date: Online finding aid last updated 2026 May 4.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: Finding aid description and metadata in this record are licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Designation (CC0 1.0 Universal). See LSC's Metadata Rights Statement for more information.

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-05-04 12:02:05 -0700.
profiledesc.langusage: Materials are primarily in English, some materials in Japanese and Spanish.

did.abstract:
Sandra "Sandy" Gooch became invested in natural foods after suffering a severe allergic reaction to antibiotics and chemical additives in food. That experience propelled her to open the first Mrs. Gooch's Natural Foods Market in West Los Angeles, California in 1977. As an early woman entrepreneur banks were unwilling to give her a loan, so she funded the first store with her teacher retirement fund. Her success led to expansion, and she gradually built a chain of seven stores across Southern California. In doing so she became the first person, and notably woman, to open the largest market specializing in natural food and health-related items within the United States. At its height her stores were one of the largest volume retail operations of their kind, with sales volume approaching $85 million a year.
Sandy is well known throughout Southern California as an advocate of healthy eating, holistic health, and wellness. She was a trailblazer in the natural foods industry dedicated to supplying the finest, most natural, wholesome foods available. Her background in education led her to develop a thorough consumer education program, providing customers with information about healthy, natural based alternatives to highly processed foods. Education was a key part of her business model, and she actively sought out opportunities to combine education and entertainment throughout her stores.
This collection is comprised of professional papers; administrative notes; business logistics; financial records; legal correspondence; photographs; advertising and marketing materials; a significant amount of the collection consists of original drawings, copies, transparencies, and blueprints related to store design, leaflets, and customer education.
While all of the Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets are present in the collection; it is important to note that the logistics and operations of each store is not fully represented. The majority of the collection encompasses the Mrs. Gooch brand and business activities. A smaller portion is focused on the woman behind the name, Sandy Gooch, including; personal awards, personal notes, media coverage, speeches, accomplishments, and other ventures. Although they make up a smaller portion of the collection, the materials showcase Sandy as a civic leader, instrumental in shaping the conversation and laws around healthy eating and supplements in the United States.
did.physloc: Portions of the collection stored off-site. Advance notice is required for access to the collection. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Open for research. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

phystech.head: Physical Characteristics and Technical Requirements
phystech.p: CONTAINS AUDIOVISUAL/DIGITAL MATERIALS: All requests to access processed audiovisual/digital materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Reproduction and Use
userestrict.p: Property rights to the physical objects belong to the UCLA Library Special Collections. All other rights, including copyright, are retained by the creators and their heirs. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine who holds the copyright and pursue the copyright owner or his or her heir for permission to publish where The UC Regents do not hold the copyright.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Sandy Gooch papers (Collection 2471). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Processed by Sage Scanlon-Perez, in the Center for Primary Research and Training (CFPRT), under the supervision of Emily Wittenberg, 2026.

The digital files in this collection were received on one 5.25 inch floppy disk. The disk consists of a FastBack backup archive of text files containing production descriptions, brand names, and internal catalog entries associated with Sandy Gooch's natural foods grocery operations. The disk was imaged using a KryoFlux forensic floppy controller and a 1.2 MB disk image was reconstructed from the flux streams using HxC Floppy Emulator software. The disk was scanned for viruses, with no results. An MD5 checksum was assigned to the disk image at the point of creation.

From the disk image, four files were extracted and analyzed in HxC Floppy Emulator and BitCurator. All files were screened for personally identifiable information (PII) and no files were restricted. The processed files were exported in their original formats and saved to the Library's preservation server. Human‑readable text was extracted using the strings utility and the files have been retained as access files to support researcher use. The KryoFlux flux stream files have been preserved as the archival masters. See Series 3, Customer Education.

Portions of the collection were re-housed for preservation purposes, including the disassembly of binders and original enclosures; original labels and intellectual groupings were retained when possible.

Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's Library Collections and Archives.

bioghist.head: Administrative/Biographical History
bioghist.p: Sandra "Sandy" Gooch, a former teacher, became interested in natural foods after suffering a severe allergic reaction to antibiotics and chemical additives in foods. That experience propelled her to join forces with Don Volland to open the first Mrs. Gooch's Natural Foods Market in West Los Angeles, California in 1977. In doing so, she became the first person, and notably woman, to open the largest market specializing in natural food and health-related items within the United States. She gradually expanded to build a chain of seven stores across Southern California. At their height, her stores were one of the largest volume retail operations of their kind, with sales volume approaching $85 million a year.

Sandy Gooch is well known throughout Southern California as an advocate of healthy eating. She was a trailblazer in the natural foods industry dedicated to supplying the finest, most natural, wholesome foods available. In the words of the company mission, "Mrs. Gooch's is committed to offering the highest quality of natural foods, related products, service and information which optimize and enrich the health and well-being of the individual and the environment, as well as our planet." Her markets' managers held their suppliers to rigorous standards, and customers could expect quality at all store locations. In fact, the standards she implemented in her stores set the bar for natural products across the United States. A product was deemed "Goochable" if it met her criteria for excellence. Her background in education led her to develop a thorough consumer education program, providing customers with information about healthy, natural-based alternatives to highly processed foods. She was especially savvy with branding, and created an intentional decor department that helped craft her signature store and window displays.

In 1993, Whole Foods Market acquired all locations of Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets. From there, Sandy's role as an industry advocate, innovator, entrepreneur, and community volunteer continued to flourish through various projects.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Content
scopecontent.p: This collection is comprised of professional papers, customer education materials, administrative notes, business logistics, financial records, legal correspondence, photos, and advertising and marketing materials. A significant amount of the collection consists of original drawings, copies, transparencies, and blueprints related to store design. This reflects Mrs. Gooch's deep commitment to informing customers about healthy alternatives and the impact of highly processed food on health and wellness. While all seven of Mrs. Gooch's locations are present in the collection, it is important to note that the logistics and operations of each store is not fully present. Additionally, some stores are more represented than others. Notably absent is any administrative information regarding the merger with Whole Foods in 1993, although some photos from events post-merger and ephemera are present. While the majority of the collection encompasses the Mrs. Gooch brand and business activities, a smaller portion is focused on the woman behind the name "Sandy Gooch" including personal awards, personal notes, media coverage, speeches, accomplishments, and other ventures. Although they make up a smaller portion of the collection, the materials showcase Sandy as a civic leader, instrumental in shaping the conversation around healthy eating and good food in the United States.

The digital files were created by Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets during the late 1980s to early 1990s to document and preserve detailed listings of packaged foods, beverages, sauces, canned goods, and other inventory items, many of which are identified as organic or specialty products. The files were written to an IBM PC hard disk then backed up to a 5.25 inch floppy disk using the FastBack utility. The material reflects the stores' product offerings and internal categorization practices during the period in which the backup was created and appears to represent a portion of a larger inventory or database system used by the company.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p:
This collection has been arranged in the following series:
Series 1: Advertising/Marketing Records (1983-2000)
Subseries 1.1: Art (1983)
Subseries 1.2: Store Decor Records (1985-2000)
Series 2: Business Operation Records (1977-1998)
Subseries 2.1: Administrative Records (1979-1998)
Subseries 2.2: International Partnership Records (1981-1996)
Subseries 2.3: Stores' Records (1987-1994)
Series 3: Customer Education Materials (1979-1996)
Series 4: Ephemera (1991-1994)
Series 5: Photographs (1979-1995)
Subseries 5.1: General Albums/Photographs
Subseries 5.2: Store Albums/Photographs
Series 6: Public Relations' Records (1977-2017)
Subseries 6.1: Civic Endeavors (1995-1997)
Subseries 6.2: Gooch's PR Program Records (1992-1993)
Subseries 6.3: Sandy Gooch Records (1977-2017)

controlaccess.subject: Health
Women civic leaders
Women educators -- California -- Los Angeles -- Archives
Women-owned business enterprises -- Oregon -- Eugene -- Archives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Creative materials related to the decor department, including original art, copies, brainstorming for window displays and store decoration. Also includes business operations as related to decor, including invoices, delivery slips, and budgets. Showcases the founders intentions with store branding and image.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Series is organized into two sub-series. Some binders and folders were disassembled however contents were maintained in original order as reflected in some of the arrangement, especially within Sub-series 1. Otherwise content was arranged thematically and chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies and original artwork associated with advertising and marketing. There is repetition of themes, subject matter, and content. The files showcase consistency in stylistic choice, featuring mostly black and white illustrations in a hyper-realistic and cartoon style.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Some binders were disassembled but their contents were maintained in original order, otherwise art was grouped thematically.

did.unittitle: Copies: Baked Goods, Cheese, Dairy & Eggs, Critters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of artwork featuring baked goods, cheese, dairy and eggs, critters.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order, with original labels.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of original art feauturing different black and white cartoon animals.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order, continued from the first folder.

did.unittitle: Copies: Dried Fruits and Nuts, Grains, Frozen, Grocery and Household

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of original black and white cartoon and hyper-realistic art featuring dried fruits and nuts, grains, and frozen, grocery and household items.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order and continued from folder 2.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of original art, formal labels are missing but metadata on individual copies identifies it as the meat section.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder retained in original order.

did.unittitle: Copies: Miscellaneous, Nutrition and Body Care

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of original art featuring miscellaneous objects/topics and nutrition and body care.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder retained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of original black and white sketches featuring both cartoon and hyper-realistic people, and produce. Produce includes herbs as well as fruit and vegetables.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of black and white hyper-realistic sketches of produce, as in fruits and vegetables.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of black and white sketches featuring both hyper-realistic and cartoon scenery, utensils, and in the Nancy. U section: critters and people.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains copies of original artwork featuring a range of topics, including: produce, critters, people, some Mrs. Gooch's private label products, and household items.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of an unnamed binder, maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a variety of illustrations including: miscellaneous copies of critters, some logo sketches. Also includes Mrs. Gooch's Ranch Markets List of Illustrations 1983.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The list of Illustrations is maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of art including: scenery and some Passover labels.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings of animals, some are hyper-realistic and others are in a more cartoon style, notably a chicken in beach attire. Some repetition of characters and scenes across folders.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized thematically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings of food, including, but not limited to: cooked meals, sandwiches, baked goods, cheese.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized thematically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts of Mrs. Gooch's Private Product Labels.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Illustrations featuring hyper-realistic point work and cartoon style and covering a range of subjects, including but not limited to: sombreros, trucks, holidays, kitchen tools, textiles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings featuring people, some close-ups and some pictured within scenes. Style ranges from cartoon to hyper-realistic. Some in color, mostly in black and white.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents arranged thematically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings, mostly in black and white but some in color, predominantly hyper-realistic herbs and flowers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original drawings of produce, predominantly hyper-realistic but some in cartoon style.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original, hyper-realistic drawings of a range of store products, including but not limited to: beverages, gift baskets, dairy products, vitamins, sauces, and shelf stable products.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents the operational side of the decor department with a focus on correspondence and purchases with decor suppliers, decor budgets, and drafts of window displays and internal decoration.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by subject with files organized alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a 1990 general decor budget, decor budgets for Redondo Beach and Beverly Hills, and the Beverly Hills Window.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Delivery slips, budgets, and invoices from the following antique suppliers: The Little Red Wagon, Charles and Charles inc., and Stage One Innovations, inc. Includes a 'Mrs. Gooch's Cost Estimate Summary 1990 Season' from Stage One Innovations, inc. Some communication between Nancy Uyemura and suppliers.

did.unittitle: Delivery Slips and Invoices from Decor Suppliers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes delivery slips and invoices from Stage One Innovations, inc., The Little Red Wagon, and some suppliers from Texas. Also includes some communication with suppliers about deliveries and invoices.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes oversized and folded blueprints of an unidentified store, oversized and folded designs for window displays, four oversized envelopes in original order containing signage for window displays from various typography companies. Also contains the designs and blueprints for the Christmas Windows 1989 Design, titled Twas The Night Before Christmas and designs for an Easter display.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains catalogues, communications, invoices from Beaver Valley, a main supplier of decor.
Folder 4: Communication, invoices and catalogues from Golden Oldies.
Folder 5: mostly undated catalogues and notes from suppliers, one Antique Register, VOL 3. NO 3, dated May-June 2000.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a catalogue, invoices and communication from Golden Oldies a main supplier of decor.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes catalogues and newspapers from decor suppliers, along with some handwritten notes and communication.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of decor department accomplishments.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains plans for decor, handwritten notes detailing necessary items and work flow, communication between Nancy U. and Sandy, as well as a list of antiques.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains drafts of the history of the decor department, some sketches, and vintage pamphlets.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents business operations of Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets Inc. through administrative records, correspondence, and meeting notes. Demonstrates international business operations along with operations of individual store locations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into three sub-series, by theme and subject. Files throughout series and sub-series are arranged alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Business logistics, marketing records, human resources records, correspondence, meeting notes, and customer surveys.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by subject and original grouping when identifiable. Includes some disassembled binders. Files arranged alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains the contents of a folder separated into the following sections: Organic Produce, Gooch Articles, Irradiation, Alar, Oils, Food Additives, Misc.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains the final report of the Dietary Supplements Task Force, information on the FDA's regulations of dietary supplements, and communication and information from the Department of Health and Human Services on dietary supplements.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a range of materials related to general business operations, including: hand-out on how to properly roll up sandwiches, team member activities, and retail signs rules and recommendations by Sandy.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains general records related to business operations, including: business organization structure, 'Mrs. G criteria for getting product into store,' some drafts of an essay, and a folder labeled HAACP.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically, with undated materials at the back of the file. Includes one original folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains an assessment of market trends, 'Mrs. Gooch's Marketing Strategies,' L.A. Times Selective Market Coverage Program, and various schedules for Gazettes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Business Logistics: Quality Assurance Program Records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains records related to the research and subsequent proposal for Mrs. Gooch's Quality Assurance Program.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence about printing and circulation of Gazettes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains emails, faxes, handwritten notes mostly to/from Sandy Gooch. Multiple emails with a lawyer about an "Potential Trademark/Service Mark Registration for 'Woodsy-Store Image Design."

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains faxes, letters, emails to/from Nancy Uyemura and Sandy.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: General materials related to customer relations including: product surveys, business account courtesy check cashing card application. Also includes communication with customers, including: diabetic shopping list, sea food and meat safety.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains "Mrs. Gooch's Natural Foods Ranch Markets: Customer Survey." Sections include: Survey method, Characteristics of Customers and Perception of Mrs. Gooch's, Marketing of Vitamins and Supplements, Marketing Conclusions and Recommendations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Maintained in original binding in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mrs. Gooch's Customer Surveys, broken down into the following chapters: Demographics, Shopping Patterns, Key Concerns of Customers, Preliminary Positioning Questions, Customer Preferences, Customer Product Knowledge, Coupons, Label Reading Habits, Profile-Heavy, Medium, Light Shoppers. Also includes methodology and sample deviation.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Maintained in original binding in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains notes from the holiday gift basket committee meeting, and two note pads full of handwritten notes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The two notepads are maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sandy's handwritten notes on a range of topics, including but not limited to: marketing objectives, strategies, upscale gourmet grocery, reflections on meetings.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Some materials organized by original paper clips and maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: General records related to acquiring and incorporating meat products, including a template letter for suppliers, and a draft of the meat questionnaire.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Product Suppliers: Origins and Aveda Records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials from Origins and Aveda, such as: brochures, pamphlets and handouts.

did.unittitle: Product Suppliers: Tropical Rainforest and Oldways Records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials from Tropical Rainforest and Oldway Records about their products.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Two original folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 'Questions and Answers for Mrs. Gooch's Employees Regarding Whole Foods Market'. This document talks about the merger, transition plans, and terms of the merger. Also includes, Team Member Stock Purchase Plan.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three folders labeled 'Mrs. Gooch's Whole Foods Market.' They appear to be PR packs with overlap in content. Some documents regarding a celebration at Whole Foods honoring Sandy Gooch.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes original folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a Weekly Sales Report by Store, Fair Market Value Assessment for MG's, Mrs. Gooch's 1989 Marketing Budget, some documents regarding Gazettes and store decor.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A copy and final version of the Employee Information Handbook broken down into the following sections: About our Company, How We Are Organized, Joining Us, Employee Dates/Definitions, Your Salary, Days and Hours of Work, Leaves of Absence, Personal Conduct at Work, Safety and Security, General Information, Our Employee Benefits.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Two bound pamphlets maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A final version of the Employee Information Handbook broken down into the following sections: About our Company, About our Commitments, About our Communication System, About Joining Us, About our Customer Service, About Workdays and Salary, About Company Standards, About Leaves of Absence, About Safety and Security, About General Policies and Information, About Employee Benefits.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Bound pamphlet maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Four copies of Mrs. Gooch's Natural News Employee Newsletter.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a product knowledge workbook and related questions for employees, and some information for tour leaders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Job descriptions for Visual Communications Director and Visual Merchandisers. Accompanied with a fax from Nancy U.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains forms for employee performance evaluation for non-management and management, employee action notice, team member performance self-evaluation, Administrative wage guideline program and store performance and wage evaluation guideline.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically, and one pamphlet remains in original binding.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets inc. export business overseas, legal and trademark issues in Japan, collaborations and correspondence with Japanese businesses, and trips abroad.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by subject and original grouping when identifiable. Files arranged alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letters, emails, and faxes with various business connections in Japan.

did.unittitle: Correspondence and Business Records with Sportsman International

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and Memorandum of Understanding with Sportsman International, Inc. about the export and sale of Argentine Beef Liver. Certificate of Export to Japan. The MOU details how Mrs. Gooch's asigns Sportsman International, Inc. as exclusive exporter of its products. Sportsman International, Inc. includes a 'Mrs. Gooch's Products Export Agreement.' Letters addressed to Nancy Uyemura.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Early Childhood Education Pilot Research Project Records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pamphlet and correspondence regarding the Early Childhood Education Pilot Research Project.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence with Sugimura International Patent and Trademark Agency Bureau concerning "Japanese Trademark Appln. No. 63,407/83, Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Ranch Markets inc. Trademark Application for Registration of Mrs. Gooch's Logo". Correspondence with the law offices of Pastoriza, Kelly and Lowry concerning the trademark application. A copy of "Gooch's v. Sawada Japan- Trademark Conflict/Settlement (Instruction for Mr. Sugimura)." Correspondence with Sanyo Tsusho Co., LTD about 'Mr.s Gooch's Products Line' and 'Trademark [Mrs. Gooch's] in Japan.

did.unittitle: Japanese Trademark Application and Legal Correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains legal correspondence about Sawada/Mrs. Gooch's Logo-Japan, Trademark Conflict. A request to File Trademark Application for Registration of Mrs. Gooch's Logo. United States Patent and Trademark Office registration

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes legal communication about Japanese Trademark Application, including: "Japan-Existing and Potential Trademark Registrations" and "Opposition against Japanese Trademark Application NO. 63,406/83."Translation of Official Copy of Decision for Registration." Draft and official Mrs. Gooch's leaflet about settlement and registration of trademark.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Notes and Correspondence with Nichii Co.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes handwritten notes from a meeting with Nicchi Co. and Mrs. Gooch's in Osaka, Japan. Also includes email correspondence with a letter of intent for the potential purchase of Mrs. Gooch's Natural Foods Markets, Inc.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: In addition to undated notes arranged thematically, there is one original folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three copies of Focus Japan, VOL 17. NO's 2-4. One copy of the Foreign Trader, the newsletter of the foreign trade association of Southern California. One copy of the Japan Economic Journal VOL 28, NO. 1401. Two brochures for Japanese health food brands in Japanese. One copy of the Investor's Daily, "Japan-U.S. Societies Expand into New Business Role."

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Translations of Mrs. Gooch's Leaflets and Speeches

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Mrs. Gooch's Food Supplement Series, a pamphlet in English and Japanese. Copy inside says "We have blended American natural source materials for Japanese likes. Food Supplement especially made for Japanese." A copy of The Amazing Story of Mrs. Gooch's in Japanese. Two leaflets of Mrs. Gooch's Standards and Practices in Japanese.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an itinerary for Mrs. Gooch's Group, first class menu, assortment of receipts, 'Itinerary for the Management of Mrs. Gooch's' from the Nichii Company. Some handwritten notes about the different trips.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents operations unique to each store location.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by store location, files arranged alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes multiple pages of 'things to be done' with date and person assigned to the task. Decor Schedule, with calendar and details of the themes for each store. Handwritten notes for Fall and Holiday decor for all stores. Agenda for Decor Staff Meeting from 1990. 1994 Excellence in Advertising Competition Enrollment Form from the National Grocers Association. Handwritten note about 'The General Store.'

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes originals of Beverly Hills' location maps and measurements, an antique redo, some floor plans and to-do lists.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Three original folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes maps and measurements of Glendale location, current inventory of plants and trees, a 'Plant Proposal for Glendale' and a 'Punch List Plant Care Standards.'

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes an original folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes originals of the Hermosa Beach location floor plan, measurements, and some copies of 'Hermosa Beach Retail Floor Map.' Also contains blueprints for a remodel.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes an original folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes original floor plans and measurements, copies of the floor plan, and some information about the remodel.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contains three folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes handwritten notes/plans for store designs, to-do lists and plans for the layout of general decor and antiques throughout the store. Also contains copies of the store's floor plan, handwritten notes on general decor scenes, to-do lists, and antique needs.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes four original folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some originals and copies of the floor plan.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes two original folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Mrs. Gooch's Thousand Oaks Market Pre-Opening Community Public Relations Report, and an original map of the location.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes one original folder in original order, other documents are arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: Thousand Oaks: Customer Survey and Initial Positioning Survey (A-C)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Customer Survey and Initial Positioning Survey Volume 1 section A-C: Customer Survey Introduction, Customer Survey Basic Tabulation, Education of Customers on Mrs. Gooch's Products.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Thousand Oaks: Customer Survey and Initial Positioning Survey (D-L)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Customer Survey and Initial Positioning Survey (D-L): Profile: 'Heavy Shoppers', Profile: 'Light Shoppers', Summary:Differences and Similarities, Heavy versus Light Shoppers, Analysis: Customer Survey, Initial Positioning Survey- Introduction, Basic Tabulation: Initial Positioning Survey, Analysis: Initial Positioning Survey, Summary of Recommendations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains some copies of store maps.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents Sandy Gooch's commitment to customer education through marketing, advertisements, children's activities.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by function, record type, and theme. Files arranged alphabetically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes column ads covering a range of topics, including but not limited to: weight loss, salt, dental preservation, health and body seminars, in-store sales.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter available for free at all locations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter available for free at all store locations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes original drafts and copies of Mrs. Gooch's Window Game Pages and Gooch Kids' activities.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes various leaflets and bound pamphlets, such as: 'The Amazing Story of Mrs. Gooch's' and 'Most Commonly Asked Questions by Mrs. Gooch's Customers.' According to the donor these materials were present at each check out counter and available for free for all customers.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes various leaflets on a range of topics. According to the donor these materials were present at each check out counter and available for free for all customers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes leaflets on a range of topics. According to the donor these materials were present at each check out counter and available for free for all customers.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some recipes, Gazettes, and leaflets.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Two folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter available for free at all locations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter available for free at all locations, these editions contain health related articles and recipes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletter available for free at all locations, these editions contain health related articles and recipes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Draft of art and lettering for Mrs. Gooch's Gazette.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes originals and copies of Mrs. Gooch's Window Games, game activities correlate with a window display that reflects a holiday or season.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged numerically in ascending order.

dao.xlink:title: Property of Mrs. Gooch's Information Systems

daodesc.p: Property of Mrs. Gooch's Information Systems

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes recipes and a bound pamphlet featuring prize winning recipes from the third and fourth annual natural food bake-off contest, and one floppy disk containing a backup archive of product descriptions, brand names, and internal catalog entries of specialty foods. The disk is labeled "Property of Mrs. Gooch's Information Systems."

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically, and contains one bound booklet maintained in original order.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some editions of Mrs. Gooch's Gazettes, mostly recipes.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Original folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A majority of the transparency negatives are column ads, however there are some coupons, drawings, and labels.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Where possible original order was maintained with contents kept in original envelopes, however due to preservation needs some of the transparency negatives were removed from their original folders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes transparency negatives originally labeled with these themes: health and body, cooking naturally, and column ads.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Due to preservation needs the transparency negatives were removed from their original envelopes and individually wrapped in mylar.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes transparency negatives originally labeled with these themes: health and body, cooking naturally, and column ads.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes transparency negatives with these main themes: health and body, vitamins, produce, labels. The content reflects what the donor identified as a crucial part of her business model, educating the customer.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets Inc. daily materials and operations including store bags, private product labels, stationery, and miscellaneous.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by format.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an assortment of ephemera: a bag of seeds, Courtesy Check Cashing Application, buttons, art and copy for the coloring books.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Mrs. Gooch's private product labels for various beverages.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Various larger form private product labels.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes four portfolios featuring Mrs. Gooch's Private Product labels, some repetition across folders.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Four original portfolios maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Private Product Labels (Unnamed Binder)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes private product labels organized according to these original categories: Applesauce, Barbeque Sauce, Cheese, Chips, Conserves, Granola, Juice, Mayonnaise, Muffines, Pasta, Pasta Sauce, Peanut Butter, Pickles, Pizza, Rice, Safflower Oil, Salsa, Tuna, and a last category missing a label for vitamins.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains several of Mrs. Gooch's Private Product Labels for different vitamins.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Four original envelopes maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes assorted ephemera of unused envelopes, business card holders, notepad pages, and stickers. The donor highlighted how the stationery was made to look like the brown store bags, showcasing her detail-oriented approach.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes various bags, including: paper, plastic, and cloth. Bags range in condition, with most in nearly perfect state.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographic prints, negatives, and slides documenting Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets Inc. events, individual store locations, newspaper promos, window displays, and decor inside stores.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into two sub-series, arranged by subject and original grouping when identifiable.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Original order maintained through photo albums/binders, some disassembled. Original order and grouping maintained when identifiable, otherwise organized thematically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an album put together by Nancy Uyemura and staff in 1993, showcasing the decor department's accomplishments across all the stores.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Album maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some photos and slides, mostly negatives and contact sheets. Original envelope for a set of negatives and contact sheet was labeled 'Net Food Expo Pre-school Kids.'

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: For preservation reasons negatives were removed from original envelopes and stored in negative sleeves.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some photos and negatives, mostly photos from an art contest sponsored by Mrs. Gooch's for the students at the Braille Institute of Los Angeles.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: For preservation purposes negatives were removed from original envelopes and stored in negative sleeves.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some photographs, negatives, and contact sheets. One photograph depicts Mrs. Gooch's employees at a stand inside the store tabling for the Dietary Supplement Health and Education Act.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: For preservation purposes negatives were removed from original envelopes and stored in negative sleeves, contact sheets and some photographs were wrapped in mylar.

did.unittitle: Marketing Promo: Photographs of Sandy Gooch

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes large portraits of Sandy Gooch with various store items.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes one folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes negatives, contact sheets, and prints of elaborate displays, food, and other products.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 1 (Beverly Hills and Thousand Oaks)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: According to the original labels and captions the slides showcase the different departments in the Beverly Hills and Thousand Oaks store.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 1 (Thousand Oaks and Glendale)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: According to original labels and captions the slides showcase the different departments in the Thousand Oaks and Glendale stores.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 1 (Glendale, Northridge, and West LA)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: According to original labels and captions, the slides showcase the different departments in the Glendale, Northridge, and West LA stores.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: According to original labels and captions, the slides showcase different departments in the Redondo Beach location: Meat, Demo, Housewares, Flowers, Supplements, Grocery, Produce, Frozen Case, Front End, Body Care, Cosmetics, Dairy, Bakery, Deli, Exterior, Checkstand.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2 (Redondo Beach, Sherman Oaks, and Literature)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of a binder labeled 'Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2.' Slides feature the departments of the Redondo Beach and Sherman Oaks locations, with one page at the end featuring literature used for advertising.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2 (Literature, Produce Dock, Shop, and Decor)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of a binder labeled 'Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2.' Slides are divided into categories labeled as literature, produce dock, shop, and decor.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2 (Decor and Beverly Hills Window Displays)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contents of a binder labeled 'Mrs. Gooch's Slides 2.' Slides are divided into categories labeled: Decor and Beverly Hills Window. The Beverly Hills Window section has notes detailing slides featuring: Christmas Window, Spring/Easter, and Fall.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints, negatives, contact sheets, and slides; some featuring Sandy but mostly of store employees. An envelope of prints features Patrick Bradley, and a photo of Sandy Gooch and her husband Harry Lederman.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints and Polaroids of inventory from decor distributors.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints, slides, negatives, and contact sheets featuring decorations throughout unidentified stores.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints featuring the shelving, aisles, products, and gondolas in unidentified Mrs. Gooch's locations.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Album: Photographs of the Private Label and Sandy Gooch

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of Mrs. Gooch's private label and Sandy Gooch.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled album maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Album: Photographs of a Store's Interior

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contains the contents of a binder in original order.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Album: Photographs of Six of the Stores

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of six of Mrs. Gooch's stores in the following order: Thousand Oaks, Northridge, Glendale, Sherman Oaks, Beverly Hills, Redondo Beach.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Original album maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Album: Photographs of West L.A. and Hermosa Beach Stores

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of the interior of the West L.A. store and exterior shots of the Hermosa Beach store. Some pages at the end include leaflets and ephemera.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a photo album maintained in original order. Due to preservation needs the album was disassembled and each page individually wrapped in mylar.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Album: Photographs of an Unidentified Store

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some photos removed from a binder, and a binder featuring photos of an unidentified store, products, and some newsletters.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The contents of an album maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Unnamed Binder: Photographs of Food Displays and Beverly Hills Store Windows

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First half of the binder is labeled 'Food Displays in The Mrs. Gooch's Markets' with accompanying photos, and the second half of the binder is labeled, "Scenes Designed by Artists For Mrs. Gooch's Beverly Hills Street Windows."

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographic prints, negatives, and slides documenting operations, events, remodels, and decor at all of the Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Market Inc. locations.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by store location and original grouping when identifiable.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of the windows done at the Beverly Hills Mrs. Gooch's store over the course of a few seasons and years. Some photo displays are accompanied with the related Gooch Kid's Window Game handout. Includes a page with the specific dates and names of each window display.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Album maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of the windows done at the Beverly Hills Mrs. Gooch's store. Also includes some related Gooch Kids activities.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Album maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Beverly Hills decor across seasons and holidays, organized according to the following labels: Christmas, Winter, Valentine, Miscellaneous, Spring, Cinco de Mayo, May Day,

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of the Beverly Hills Window across different seasons and holidays. A majority of the photographs are labeled with their date, title, and theme; some are accompanied by a correlating Mrs. Gooch's Window Game.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes miscellaneous photos, negatives, and some prints of the Beverly Hills store.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes several photos of the Beverly Hills Window display, these lack labels but feature Christmas, Winter, and Spring.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some prints, negatives, and a cut up contact sheet.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes one envelope of rehoused photos maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes negatives, slides, and prints of the Hermosa Beach store. Predominantly featuring the exterior of the store.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an envelope of prints, negatives with contact sheets, and prints from 'Polynesian Luau Northridge' event.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an envelope of rehoused photos, original label identified the photos as the Redondo Beach store during 1991 and construction.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes one envelope of prints with the corresponding negatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of decor and displays at the Redondo Beach store.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a Panoramic Prints envelope, rehoused but retained in original order.

did.unittitle: Redondo Beach (Photo Envelope and Contact Sheets)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of decor and displays at the Redondo Beach store, with corresponding negatives. Along with some contact sheets. Photos were rehoused from an envelope originally labeled 'RB.'

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a Panoramic Prints envelope retained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prints, negatives, and contact sheets from the grand opening, an envelope of prints labeled 'S.O.,' and some slides featuring an event at the store.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes two envelopes maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos identified by donor as being from around 1984-1985. Donor confirmed that most of the photos show interior of the Sherman Oaks store, however a few depict a company wide picnic. Hosted annually, these picnics were hosted by management for all staff and their families to attend.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contains contents of a photo album, rehoused due to preservation needs but maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of seasonal displays and decorations inside the Thousand Oaks store.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Photo album maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an envelope of prints with correlating negatives and contact sheets. Also includes an envelope of prints featuring photos from a collaborative event with the American Heart Association. Some miscellaneous negatives and prints of the exterior of the store.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes prints originally housed in a Panoramic Prints envelope labeled 'T.O.' that was rehoused due to preservation needs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes polaroids featuring store plans, remodels, and store decor.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Envelope maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes negatives, slides, and prints of the exterior and interior of the Torrance store. Majority of the interior photos are of the deli section.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an envelope of prints, negatives, and cut contact sheet all originating from a Panoramic Prints envelope labeled 'WLA.' Polaroids of interior and exterior of store. One folder showcasing a baking competition held at the West L.A. store. According to the donor, at these events customers would bake desserts using healthy alternatives and community members would vote on the best tasting dish.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes one folder maintained in original order. Prints were removed from an original Panoramic Prints envelope for preservation needs, but maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: West LA (Contact Sheet of Field Trip)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a contact sheet and negatives, original envelope contains the following metadata: "Field Trip-WLA Mrs. Gooch" and "Field Trip to Mrs. Gooch's" and "Sandy Visit to St. Mary's".

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes negatives and a contact sheet removed from an original envelope for preservation purposes. Original envelope was maintained alongside them due to the rich metadata present.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes contact sheets and portraits of Sandy Gooch posed in the West LA store. A majority of the photos feature Sandy alone, but a few include other members of the team. A contact sheet and large prints show Sandy, Sue Epstein (Staff Nutritionist), and Dan Volland (General Manager/Partner) posed outside of the West LA store.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes envelopes of prints, negatives, and contact sheets. One envelope included label of 'Eco Expo.'

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents public relations by Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets inc., and the personal and professional life of Sandy Gooch through civic endeavors, media coverage, and personal achievements.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into three sub-series. Original groupings and labels maintained when identifiable.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an original pamphlet from the Beverly Hills Women of Achievement Awards 1992, The Art of Achievement the Top 50 Women Business Owners, various awards for Mrs. Gooch's Natural Food Markets from the Beverly Hills Chamber of Commerce.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes multiple copies of first place certificate from the 11th Annual Beverly Hills Store Decorating Contest.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Files arranged alphabetically.

did.unittitle: Planting the Seeds of Nutritional Awareness in our Schools (Binder)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes materials for the UCLA Project Issues: Planting the Seeds of Nutritional Awareness in Our Schools Institute. Including original categories: 'Group/Teacher Plans' and '48th Dist. Agric,' 'Am. Cancer Soc.'
Box 34, Folder 1: Contains a VHS labeled, Venice High Healthy Meals Team Sandy Gooch Enterprises Healthy School Meals Program August 30, 1995.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Venice High Healthy Meals Team Presentation Materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes presentations by the Venice High Healthy Meals Team. A Presentation to the National Potato Board, presentation for Scope, Sequence and Coordination Science Alliance, and a presentation for Science-Share-A-Thon.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Four folders maintained in original order, and one originally bound pamphlet.

did.unittitle: Venice High Healthy Meals Team VHS

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes one VHS labeled: Sandy Gooch Enterprises Healthy School Meals Program. Venice High Healthy Meals Team.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Public relations materials including pahmplets, recipes, gazettes, tours, lectures.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Includes contents of disassembled binders maintained in original order, and folders maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Public Relations Program Binder (Publicity and Promotions)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes materials organized under the categories of publicity and promotions. Includes one tape labeled Food Trends from 1993.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The contents of a binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Public Relations Program Binder (Promotions, Tours, Lectures)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials are organized under the categories: Promotions, Tours, Lectures.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Public Relations Program Binder (Lectures, Health and Body Seminars, Donations)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials are organized under the categories: Lectures, Health and Body Seminars, Donations. Donations are listed out for the 1st and 2nd quarter of 1992.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Mrs. Gooch's Public Relations Program Binder (Donations, Customer Correspondence)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials are organized under the categories: Donations (for the 4th quarter of 1992, and for the 1st and 2nd quarter of 1993), Mrs. Gooch's Shopping Guides (celiac, macrobiotic, low-fat, diabetic, kosher, healthy fast foods, organic products), and Customer Correspondence.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains folders with public relations materials, including: pamphlets, recipes, gazettes, press, business cards. There is some repetition across folders.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Folders maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some original magazines, newspaper cuttings, and copies of press about Mrs. Gooch's and Sandy Gooch.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Documents the personal accomplishments of Sandy Gooch including speeches, publications, personal notes, consultations for other ventures.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials organized thematically and files arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
Includes materials labeled 1-13 according to the following categories:
1. Synopsis of Mrs. Gooch's and Sandy Gooch Enterprises,
2. Biography,
3. A newsletter that was sent out by Sandy Gooch and her husband, Harry S. Lederman 2001 to friends and business associates,
4. Company Principles,
5. Sandy Gooch Enterprises' Real Estate Division,
6. Examples of articles that have appeared in publications regarding properties that Sandy Gooch built and/or refurbished and sold.,
7. Examples of articles published and awards given regarding Sandy Gooch's civic endeavors,
8. Examples of articles written and T.V. newscasts about a pro bono pilot project, The Healthy Meals Team, that is in effect at Venice High School in the Los Angeles Unified School District).,
9. Examples of acknowledgements and awards Sandy Gooch has received,
10. Examples of Mrs. Gooch's consumer communication and education,
11. Examples of articles that have been published about Sandy Gooch or the company during her ownership of Mrs. Gooch's,
12. Examples of a monthly contribution by Sandy Gooch to the publication, 'Health Express.' The complete production occurred at Sandy Gooch's home.
13. A book written by Sandy Gooch that sold over 10,000 copies

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order. There is repetition across folders as the content was reproduced multiple times, however not fully present in all folders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes and ideas from meetings between Sandy Gooch, Harry Lederman, and Howard Schultz (CEO of Starbucks) regarding the potential of a new business. They discussed the potential of a Juice Bar and Apothecary. In addition to some research on homeopathy and Chinese herbs there are mock-ups for potential logos.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a disassembled binder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes information about the Circle of Green Video Tape and Circle of Green list of workshop speakers, and related correspondence.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

did.unittitle: DSHEA Senate Bill and Other Accomplishments (Binder)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder with materials about how Mrs. Gooch's and Sandy were instrumental in getting the DSHEA Senate Bill 784 passed.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Contents of a binder maintained in original order. One folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence from Sandy to Mark, with additional materials related to the correspondence. Includes an analysis of two specific stores: Whole Foods, Chicago and Fresh Fields in Naperville- regarding each store's strengths and weaknesses. Notes from 7th Annual Workshop on Urban Design.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Disassembled binder maintained in original order.

did.unittitle: Leading Design Partners/Sandy Gooch Enterprises inc. Records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence from Leading Design Partners and Sandy Gooch Enterprises inc. Also includes a magazine from Kyoichi Kurokawa's Design, a public relations pack from Juice Club, and a mailer from Hodgetts and Fung Design Associates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes cards, letters, and written notes, between family and Sandy's greater network.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of 'If You Love Me Don't Feed Me Junk' by Sandy Gooch and draft of the artwork for the cover of the book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes some handwritten, but mostly typed up speeches. Lacking information on event and date.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes multiple copies of a speech by Sandy Gooch for Earth Day 1990.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a Natural Products Speech for Japan, and a speech for the Women Entrepreneurs Beyond Borders event in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico. The speech for the event in Puerto Vallarta is translated into Spanish, 'Guia Para La Mujer De Negocios' and also includes an English version.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes handwritten notes and typed up speech for the FMI Conference in Chicago, "The Industry is Expanding...Naturally." Also includes a copy of a Wild Oats Lecture from Japan, and a speech under the original label of NAWBO-1995 (Orange County).

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically. Includes on folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a speech for the Brentwood Library and opening remarks for the Natural Business Seminar, 'How People Learn.'

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically. Includes one folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence about speaking events, and panelist discussion notes for an event at the Kauffman Foundation.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically. Includes one folder maintained in original order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence with Assistant Dean of UCLA's Executive MBA Program extending invitation to participate in the Distinguished Speakers' Series, corresponding speech labeled 'U.C.L.A. Speech' and pamphlet from event. Also includes folders with notes for speeches at USC.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged chronologically. Includes two folders maintained in original order.
